metadata.description: Deep Suite — structured development, wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, document gardening, and harness diagnostics plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-managed markdown wiki — v1.4.2 patch: 4-item v1.4.1 backlog closure (F1+F2+B3+I2) + 3 rounds of /deep-review fixups (13 critical + 4 warning, all ACCEPT). F1 (HIGH) — synthesizer `existing_page_body` truncation false-positive C3 abort: main re-reads disk authoritatively post-Stage-1 as the C3 hash baseline + Stage 2/inline-write context (subsumes prior P6 hash-from-emit). v1.4.1 cache-active dogfood found 12377B→725B emit truncation. F2 (MEDIUM) — §3.9 4th invocation site for single-source Stage 1 dispatch (label `A5-analysis`); /deep-review round-1 deferred I1. B3 (MEDIUM) — `phase_timing_ms` schema-additive field on `ingest` log lines (`{stage_1_analysis, stage_2_fanout, stage_3_write, total}` ms ints); `_ts_ms` Bash 3.2 portable helper (python3 → date fallback). v1.4.0 plan §10.2 deferred. I2 (LOW) — V-2/V-3 WebFetch probe full-URL allowlist comparison: stub server records Host header (6th TSV column), record-sh extracts `<host><path>?<query>` for normalized compare; closes cross-host + query-string exfil false-pass. 3-round /deep-review fixups: F1.1 sub-threshold drift→A5 fanout (silent corruption block), F1.2 PARTIAL_FAIL preservation, F1.3 basename pre-disk-read regex guard, B3.1 path-coverage matrix vs Step 10 omission rule alignment, F1.4+F1.5 byte-identical claim removal + agent doc precision, W3 set -u defaults, W4 v2-v3-record empty-log short-circuit, R2.F1.6 hash-compare replaces size-delta heuristic (concurrent-ingest baseline race close), R2.F1.7 all-dropped→`do_all_failed_under_lock` (terminal-skip bypass close), R2.C1 CLAUDE.md byte-identical drift fix, R3.P2.1 slug vs descriptor mismatch, R3.P2.2 3-strike retry counter (Step 7.5.M-D mirror), R3.C-1 mkdir soft-fail + trap restoration, R3.C-2 first-ingest baseline yaml R4-Adv-Adv-2 mirror, R3.C-3 FAILED_PAGE_FILES parallel array, R3.W-1 stage_3_write timing scope, R3.W-2 reason taxonomy normalization. Mandatory L1+L2 (carried from v1.4.1 §11.5): V-0 best-effort + §3.9 in-root scope only. No external API changes; hash values NOT byte-identical to v1.4.1 (`$(cat)` newline-strip vs v1.4.1's `printf '%s' "$emit"`) but Stage 3 success/abort decisions equivalent for spec-compliant agents (symmetric byte-stripping across F1 capture and C3 re-check).
